title: OpeningOption
description: OpeningOption: Defines the design options for Openings.

Height.description: Defines the height the opening should be. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Defines the width the opening should be. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

SillHeight.description: The distance between the base of the panel and the bottom of the opening. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Type.description: The type of opening that should be created from this opening configuration. OpeningType: The type of cutout or hole in a building surface/panel (e.g. Window, Door, Rooflight)

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
